V-M-006.checks: Admin endpoints enforce authentication and current device/operator controls without relying on removed route-policy surfaces.
V-M-006.commands: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_auth_rejection.py tests/test_admin_device_control.py -v

phase-24-contract-guard.guard-1: Phase-24 frontend execution should consume existing admin stats, analytics, users, billing, health, and device endpoints without backend API shape changes.
phase-24-contract-guard.guard-2: If backend/app/admin or frontend-admin/src/lib/api.ts endpoint paths change during Phase-24, rerun this verification before marking V-M-037 pass-local.
phase-24-contract-guard.guard-3: Admin audit middleware must not start logging tokens, request bodies with secrets, or payment-sensitive payloads as a side effect of UI work.

levels.module-local: Run backend admin auth/device tests if M-006 files or admin API bindings change.
levels.wave-level: During Phase-24 UI-only waves, static review should confirm M-006 backend files are unchanged.
levels.phase-level: Final Phase-24 evidence records either no backend/admin diff or a passing V-M-006 rerun.

scenarios.scenario: Admin device controls list, block, unblock, rotate, and revoke a single device without disabling the whole account
Verification imports deleted route-policy modules or expects policy_dns_observer on the admin router
Compact admin UI execution silently changes admin endpoint paths, auth requirements, audit logging, or payload shape

redaction.redact-1: Admin API verification logs must not include bearer tokens, refresh tokens, cookies, raw request bodies containing secrets, or payment provider secrets.

phase-24-evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-10: Phase-24 did not modify backend/app/admin or admin API endpoint bindings in frontend-admin/src/lib/api.ts.
phase-24-evidence.evidence-2: 2026-05-10: Frontend-admin build and mobile smoke consumed existing M-006 endpoints through mocked /api/v1 responses without API shape changes.

phase-75-admin-api-gates.scope: Verification design for the approved admin Users and Devices unified inventory phase.
phase-75-admin-api-gates.gate-1: Prefer frontend-only grouping through existing /admin/users and /admin/devices contracts when it satisfies the expandable user inventory requirement.
phase-75-admin-api-gates.gate-2: If a new per-user device read endpoint is required, it must be admin-only, reuse CurrentAdmin, expose only existing AdminDevice fields, and never return VPN private keys, full configs, bearer tokens, or raw secrets.
phase-75-admin-api-gates.gate-3: Existing M-024 mutation endpoints /admin/devices/{id}/block, /unblock, /rotate, and DELETE /admin/devices/{id} must keep one-device targeting, auth requirements, and audit-compatible behavior.
phase-75-admin-api-gates.gate-4: If backend/app/admin/router.py or backend tests change in a future rerun, invalidate this frontend-only pass evidence until backend/tests/test_auth_rejection.py and backend/tests/test_admin_device_control.py pass.
phase-75-admin-api-gates.gate-5: If backend remains unchanged, Phase-75 smoke must print [AdminAPI][phase75][PROTECTED_ADMIN_API_UNCHANGED] and protected backend diff guard must be empty.

phase-75-evidence.evidence-1: Existing /admin/users and /admin/devices contracts were sufficient for the unified Users/Devices inventory; no backend/app/admin changes were made.
phase-75-evidence.evidence-3: Protected diff guard for backend/app and backend/tests was empty, so backend auth/device-control tests were not required for this frontend-only execution.
